message:
🌱 kyverno: [Bug] imagePullSecret doesn't render properly (#1054)

* 🌱 Add kyverno: [Bug] imagePullSecret doesn't render properly mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct PR URL for kyverno#13310 imagePullSecret rendering bug

PR #13350 was closed without merge. PR #13367 (merged 2025-06-17)
is the actual fix for the imagePullSecret rendering issue.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kyverno: [Bug] imagePullSecret doesn't render properly",
+    "description": "[Bug] imagePullSecret doesn't render properly. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kyverno troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kyverno deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno -n kyverno --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kyverno configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kyverno configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl get configmap -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kyverno\n```\nRight after https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/commit/385eef980e59a2965570a2ef91350e7440d08e84 the imagePullSecrets field doesn't render properly. See [playground](https://helm-playground.com/#t=N7C0AIHoCpwCQKYBsAOCBO4BmBXAdgMYAuAlgP"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug] imagePullSecret doesn't render properly",
+        "description": "*: If this PR results in new or altered behavior which is user facing, you\n\nread and follow the steps outlined in the [PR documentation guide](pr_documentation.md) and add Proof Manifests as defined below.\n-->\n\n### Proof Manifests\n\n[Here is a playground showing the output with this change\n```yaml\nimagePullSecrets:\n        - map[name:foo]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug] imagePullSecret doesn't render properly is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno -n kyverno --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kyverno --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "*: If this PR results in new or altered behavior which is user facing, you\n\nread and follow the steps outlined in the [PR documentation guide](pr_documentation.md) and add Proof Manifests as defined below.\n-->\n\n### Proof Manifests\n\n[Here is a playground showing the output with this change",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "imagePullSecrets:\n        - map[name:foo]",
+        "imagePullSecrets:\n        - name: foo",
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: roles-dictionary\n  namespace: default\ndata:\n  allowed-roles: \"[\\\"cluster-admin\\\", \\\"cluster-operator\\\", \\\"tenant-admin\\\"]\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
